fixtures.text: Your appointment is at 11am this Friday the 17th.
The next event is on Monday the 20th at 9:30am.
The bank holiday on August the 31st is all day.
Your tea alarm is set for 4:45pm today.
Your medicine alarm repeats daily at 7am in Europe London.
The exercise alarm is snoozed for fifteen minutes.
I can help with twelve alarm and calendar actions.
Please confirm sending the message to Alex at 6pm.
